raw: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. Reserve your Melrose Public Library pass for desired date. You will receive a confirmation email with an "Access Pass" link (if you do not have an email account, a printed confirmation may be picked up at the Main Desk of the library).

source_phrases.free_under_age: Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free
